CONTENT.Club career: Sanchez Da Silva arrived in the Lyon academy in 2010 from US Meyzieu, signing his first professional contract with Lyon on 2 December 2020. After figuring several times on the team sheet in January 2021, Sanchez Da Silva made his professional debut for Lyon on 6 February 2021 in a 3–0 win over Strasbourg.On 31 January 2022, Sanchez Da Silva joined Villefranche on loan until the end of the season.On 2 January 2023, Sanchez Da Silva joined Eredivisie side Volendam on a 6-month loan, scoring once as Volendam stayed up in 14th place in the 2022-23 Eredivisie.On 30 July 2023, Sanchez Da Silva moved on a new loan to RWD Molenbeek in Belgium.
CONTENT.External links: Florent Sanchez Da Silva at SoccerwayFFF ProfileOL profile Archived 1 March 2021 at the Wayback MachineFlorent Sanchez Da Silva – French league stats at Ligue 1 – also available in French
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Sanchez Da Silva is of Brazilian and Spanish descent. He is a youth international for France.

SUMMARY: Florent Sanchez Da Silva (born 2 April 2003) is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Belgian Pro League club RWD Molenbeek, on loan from  Ligue 1 club Lyon.
